summary: I inspected the Flask app and the nginx config. The health check was returning 200, but /api/data was failing because nginx was proxying to port 5001. I updated /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default so the /api/ location now proxies to http://127.0.0.1:5000, matching the Flask server. After rerunning test.sh, both tests pass and /api/data returns valid JSON.
